name: USA BMX / BMX Canada
notes: USA BMX exposes track detail pages with coordinates and Google Static Maps. Use approved exports or a permissioned connector before bulk ingestion.

name: UCI BMX Racing
notes: Use official UCI venue/event exports where available.

name: British Cycling BMX
notes: Regional venue data should be imported from approved club or federation feeds.

name: AusCycling BMX Racing
notes: Regional venue data should be imported from approved AusCycling feeds.

name: Cycling Canada BMX
notes: Canadian BMX data can merge with BMX Canada / USA BMX where permissions allow.
